title: culcitium canescens
intro: Culcitium canescens, also known as woolly culcitium, is a small, perennial herb in the family Lamiaceae that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of culcitium canescens include relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. Culcitium canescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
